---
title: "Mr Cowie"
---

## Mr Cowie

### Description

publisher

### Biography

He was evidently a partner of Charles Mozley and Walter Smith in 1874, ‘Mozley, Cowie and Smith’ appears briefly in 1874 as the imprint of the firm.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 4th 1875
- Letter from [26 September 1874]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
